'''zhatoro''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:iguanine|iguanine]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-t-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:iguanine|iguanine]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| zhatoro
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhætereth|zhætereth]] || [[word:zhæterej|zhæterej]] || [[word:zhæteresh|zhæteresh]] || [[word:zhætere|zhætere]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhatotoroth|zhatotoroth]] || [[word:zhatotoroj|zhatotoroj]] || [[word:zhatotorosh|zhatotorosh]] || [[word:zhatotoro|zhatotoro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhatoroth|zhatoroth]] || [[word:zhatoroj|zhatoroj]] || [[word:zhatorosh|zhatorosh]] || [[word:zhatoro|zhatoro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhatofroth|zhatofroth]] || [[word:zhatofroj|zhatofroj]] || [[word:zhatofrosh|zhatofrosh]] || [[word:zhatofrof|zhatofrof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhatorotho|zhatorotho]] || [[word:zhatorojo|zhatorojo]] || [[word:zhatorosho|zhatorosho]] || [[word:zhatoroko|zhatoroko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhatoroth|zhatoroth]] || [[word:zhatoroj|zhatoroj]] || [[word:zhatorosh|zhatorosh]] || [[word:zhatoro|zhatoro]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhatorothol|zhatorothol]] || [[word:zhatorojol|zhatorojol]] || [[word:zhatoroshol|zhatoroshol]] || [[word:zhatorokol|zhatorokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhatorothotho|zhatorothotho]] || [[word:zhatorojojo|zhatorojojo]] || [[word:zhatoroshosho|zhatoroshosho]] || [[word:zhatoroko|zhatoroko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhatorothon|zhatorothon]] || [[word:zhatorojon|zhatorojon]] || [[word:zhatoroshon|zhatoroshon]] || [[word:zhatorokon|zhatorokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhatorothoro|zhatorothoro]] || [[word:zhatorojoro|zhatorojoro]] || [[word:zhatoroshoro|zhatoroshoro]] || [[word:zhatorokoro|zhatorokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
